meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Solve Basic App Limits
content.seo_description: Overcome the plateau of basic app development. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship enterprise-grade SaaS features at high velocity.
content.answer_block: Stop building boilerplate and start shipping value. The Antigravity project template provides a production-ready foundation, automating complex infrastructure tasks. By integrating Claude Code, you can architect scalable SaaS applications in hours, not weeks, allowing you to focus on unique business logic while maintaining professional-grade stability and performance.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you've spent three days setting up yet another authentication flow and database schema, only to realize you're still nowhere near the actual product features. The 'basic app' trap is a silent killer of freelance margins, keeping you stuck in a cycle of repetitive, low-leverage coding while your competitors ship full-stack SaaS solutions that command premium retainers.

It is time to stop reinventing the wheel. The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural force multiplier, stripping away the friction of initial setup. When paired with the raw power of Claude Code, you move from manual implementation to high-level system orchestration, transforming your workflow from tedious task-execution into rapid product engineering.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational architecture. This step ensures your project inherits enterprise-grade directory structures and pre-configured environment security.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity SaaS boilerplate template. Include TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and optimized database drivers for PostgreSQL.

steps.title: Inject Business Logic via Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your client's requirements to the existing schema, ensuring type safety across the entire stack immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure. Create a new module for user subscription tiers with Stripe integration using the existing Antigravity service layer.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement Stripe checkout flow using the current service layer architecture'

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Synchronize your data model with the Antigravity schema definitions to avoid manual migration headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate and apply database migrations based on the new subscription schema defined in step 2.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate prisma migration for the new subscription model and apply to dev database'

steps.title: Component-Driven UI Generation
steps.description: Leverage the template's design system to build out the dashboard, maintaining a consistent professional aesthetic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard component that displays active subscription status and usage metrics using the project's internal UI library.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create dashboard UI component for subscription monitoring using Tailwind'

steps.title: Production Hardening and Audit
steps.description: Run a security and performance audit to ensure the template's defaults are optimized for the specific use case.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit on the new routes and ensure all database queries are using parameterized inputs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Audit codebase for security vulnerabilities and optimize database query performance'

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag with Claude Code when modifying core middleware to catch architectural conflicts before they break the build.
Map your Antigravity service layer to specific API routes to ensure your business logic remains decoupled from the view layer.
Use custom 'context' files in your project root to feed Claude Code your specific coding standards and naming conventions.
Pre-warm your database connection pools within the Antigravity configuration to shave milliseconds off every API request.
When scaling, leverage the Antigravity modular plugin system to swap out local development mocks for production-ready cloud services instantly.
content.next_steps: After completing this implementation, run a full integration test suite, deploy to your preferred cloud provider using the Antigravity CI/CD pipeline, and document your custom modules for future client projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate and start delivering high-value SaaS products that command premium pricing. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
